reviews.title: Lack of SVR reduction
reviews.text: Despite having to consider various factors you lifted the bar quickly in response to the base rate, however in 2025 the base rate reduced by 1 % but you only reduced the bar by 0.15 and by 0.4 since rate reductions started in comparison to a Bank of E drop of 1.5%

reviews.title: Amazing for Selfbuild
reviews.text: Very quick & very understanding when you own your own business

reviews.title: Unfair mortgage rates for existing customers
reviews.text: Not a good value for money. Mortgage terms are very opaque with arbitrary SVR variable rates with only possible goal to overcharge their customer. They have been very quick to pass on all Bank of England rate increases to the borrowers but the same standards do not apply to the reductions. At this point in time the BOE reduced the rate by 1% from their peak in 2024. Harpenden BS passed on only a third of that to the mortgage accounts leaving them hundreds £ worse off every month.

reviews.title: Disappointed. Did not live up to expectations
reviews.text: I signed up for a discounted mortgage because of the low rate, by the time my application had been accepted, it went up twice. As rates have fallen, Harpenden have only moved their mortgage rates lower and slower than the base rate, whilst fully reflecting the decreases to savers. I feel conned and ripped off and wishing I'd gone with a bigger, more professional organisation. The customer service is hard to access and clunky, which I wouldnt mind if the rates reflected a lower cost operation. I'm all for supporting the little guy, but it's all been very unsatisfactory. Beware.

reviews.title: A tracker mortgage that tracks up but not down...
reviews.text: We have a tracker mortgage with Harpenden - when interest rates were going up they were quick to track the increase and our mortgage payments changed regularly. Unfortunately it's not been the same going down - they have yet to commit to a reduction since the 6th November 2024 interest rate reduction - and they were slow to act after the first reduction. Not what most would consider a fair 'tracker' mortgage....

reviews.title: I have a commercial mortgage when it was Covid busin...
reviews.text: I have a commercial mortgage when it was Covid businesses found it very hard The interest rates have gone up and up and up we have had to wait until this September for it to start going down. The bank of England was 5% and Harpington was charging me 9.4%. Why is this? ????

reviews.title: The Brilliant work of Harpenden
reviews.text: Harpenden are our go to lender at present. Having now placed 5 cases with them in a short period i could not be more impressed. The business development team are very friendly and supportive. I can not praise Chelsea highly enough and she is a fantastic asset to Harpenden. The underwriting is efficient and knowledgeable. I have been particularly impressed by their additional queries which are well throughout and relevant. All in all, a fantastic lender who i have found are really following through with their pre agreed cases.

reviews.title: Efficient, expensive, approachable
reviews.text: The service was outstanding and the team were approachable and understanding.

reviews.title: In branch service review
reviews.text: I didn't deal directly through the Building Society but through an agent. Our indirect experience was good, although sometimes a little slow.

reviews.title: Old-fashioned, slow and low tech
reviews.text: Old school and therefore reliable, but very slow and low tech.

reviews.title: Very impressed with the way, they took the time to u...
reviews.text: Very impressed with the way, they took the time to understand my circumstances and tailor an offer around them. My mortgage broker had regular calls with his Harpenden contact.

reviews.title: Harpenden Building Society Branch Review
reviews.text: You took a very long time to approve our mortgage with a drip-drip of further questions and requests for more documents. Our solicitor charged extra due to the drawn out process and we paid for 2 months at the high default rate.

reviews.title: I need to know what your intention is with regard to...
reviews.text: I need to know what your intention is with regard to your mortgage rates

reviews.title: TIMEWASTERS!
reviews.text: Our Broker recommended this Building Society as they seemed to fit the bill for our needs. HOW WRONG HE WAS! Three months down the line and about to have our rental property we lived in put on the market due to how long they took to scrutinise our bank accounts etc, they declined us. Why? Because we paid a COMPANY business debt off A MONTH EARLY!!! To say we were gobsmacked was to say the least. We had rented the property for 11 years with no issues about paying the rent. Landlords urgently needed the property sold (we had first refusal to purchase and at BMV) so the pressure was on. I had to detail miniscule payments out of my personal bank account. One to my Son for £40! The other to a seller on Markketplace for a mere £80. We then applied to Santander and it all flew through. So save yourself A LOT OF TIME AND STRESS apply to them in the first instance. It completed within 2 months of application. How this Building Society gets any mortgage clients is beyond me. They rank something like 41. I can now see why!!!

reviews.title: Worst Customer Experience Ever
reviews.text: If you want to purchase a house using Harpenden I suggest starting 12 month in advance and you will still more than likely be disappointed. Their SLA's are a joke in the modern world, saying everything is done in person is a massive cop out and doesn't ring true. They will miss most SLA's then ghost you and ignore all communication attempts and not return calls. Avoid like the plague!

reviews.title: Not passing on Bank of England base rate reduction
reviews.text: The Bank of England have announced a 0.5% drop in the base rate to support the economy and Harpenden have decided not to reflect this in the SVR and therefore discounted mortgages where as the majority of the market has moved - i would recommend avoid getting a mortgage through them.

reviews.title: Exceptional telephone Staff.
reviews.text: I would like to express how extremely helpful the staff members were on the telephone when dealing with Cash ISA questions, namely Jane, Laura and Catherine. They were all very knowledgeable with an excellent manner, and a credit to Harpenden Building Society which I highly recommend.

reviews.title: Leighton Buzzard Branch Staff...
reviews.text: The manageress & staff of the Leighton Buzzard Branch were extremely helpful in walking me through the forms & actions I needed to enable me to change my Branch based savings & ISA accounts to the online versions

reviews.title: Great staff very helpful and knowledgeable
reviews.text: Great staff very helpful and knowledgeable

reviews.title: the best most personal bank in Hertfordshire
reviews.text: excellent customer service and always go the extra mile to help.....they take time and always address you by name, maybe not the best on rates but have a new very competitive account for local residents,

reviews.title: Staff were very welcoming and friendly
reviews.text: Staff were very welcoming and friendly, dealt with my transaction quickly and efficiently. Very impressed with the new location. Thank you ladies.

reviews.title: A really seamless Trust account opening procedure wi...
reviews.text: A really seamless Trust account opening procedure with excellent comms from Laura Tomlinson.

reviews.title: Surprise interest rate drop
reviews.text: I opened an ISA this October, understanding it was an interest rate of 4.35%. Just checked today and it is 1.6%. Was not told about this, unlike other societies.

reviews.title: I received a telephone call yesterday for a request...
reviews.text: I received a telephone call yesterday for a request regarding a charity donation nomination Found this quite surprising but if you do need an answer anything to do with young people (boys and girls ) especially if they play football would be good. If you do not have that any organisation that's close will be OK. You can choose. Regards Charles Forrester

reviews.title: I am unable to log in
reviews.text: I am unable to log in as I have the wrong internet browser. This seems to be an ongoing problem which needs to be addressed ASAP. Please get it sorted.

reviews.title: Very good Customer Service
reviews.text: Quick to respond to queries whether by email or by telephone. Friendly and helpful when I called to ask for assistance.

reviews.title: Suspended before I start!
reviews.text: I received my activation detals 2 days ago; I have used them this morning and told my user ID is suspended. Not a great start and now I have to waste time next week whena t work phoning you as your helpline is not open at weekends. Not user-friendly.

reviews.title: ISA Account opening
reviews.text: I have just applied to open an ISA and the process was straight forward. However, I feel the Form which needs to be completed to fund my account from another provider is not in my opinion user friendly. Rather than completing an extensive Form, I feel it would be a better customer service experience, if as part of the application process, there were far fewer fields for populate. Most other financial service providers, only request a sort code, account number, name of provider where the funds are to be requested from and whether this is to be released immediately or the end of a notice period/upon maturity.

reviews.title: ISA tax free status transfer requirement
reviews.text: Wishing to keep savings in an ISA. I question about a nominated account, it should also state that account (or/plus transfer to another ISA account) to keep funds tax free.

reviews.title: hard to understand their products
reviews.text: hard to understand their products

reviews.title: Why saving rates keep falling but mortgages do not?
reviews.text: Very poor practice at this BS. They keep reducing savers rates ( twice in the last two months) but not the mortgage interest. Their Standard Variable rate is completely arbitrary.

reviews.title: good speaking to Anya and very helpful, much better...
reviews.text: good speaking to Anya and very helpful, much better than digital conversations etc

reviews.title: Excellent Customer Service
reviews.text: Excellent Customer Service, both in branch and by phone to head office. A good selection of accounts but the interest rates are not especially competitive.

reviews.title: Fed up with online attemp.
reviews.text: Tried to register fo an online account as an existing customer , was asked to provide ID certification , and account was set up , but now I cannot get into system as something has been deactivated. No answer to telephone call , no waiting time given. This has been one obstacle and frustration after another . Will probably just let attempted account lapse as am fed up trying.

reviews.title: Their transfer in system has a software problem //// BEWARE
reviews.text: An ISA  transfer in from another provider has been an issue as their system is unable to recognise the £20,000 ISA limit!!! Just spoken to Emma Sinclair (Manager) and Management are aware of it but is seems they would rather pay big bonuses to shareholders than update their software!!! SHAME ON YOU HARPENDEN ! Just look at your rating on Trustpilot !

reviews.title: If you love an argument and would like…
reviews.text:
If you love an argument and would like to be treated poorly, then choose Harpenden. No Compassion, no interest in the elderly at all.
The worst building societ ever for customer service.
Remember we all get old one day and confusion and a bad memory can hit anyone!

reviews.title: Quite friendly and very helpful branch…
reviews.text: Quite friendly and very helpful branch staff, but aggressive rate management, as others have mentioned. Rates on display in branch differ from website, banking registration process is terrible. Maybe helpful to IFAs but lending experiences for personal customers is poor.

reviews.title: Not reducing variable mortgage rates in line with Bank of England
reviews.text:
Mortgage holders beware. This lender was very quick to increase their variable mortgage rates when the Bank of England was doing so. However, they have double standards when the opposite is happening and the BoE rates are decreasing. 
Unlike my experience with other, more decent lenders, Harpenden BS prefer to pad their coffers instead of passing on the saving to the customer.

reviews.title: Uncompetitive rates on savings acciunts
reviews.text: My father set up an account for my grandson, and over the last year they have been cutting the rates on those accounts far faster than the bank of england rates. We get a letter every few weeks informing us of further changes (reduction) to their rates. These guys are a con, and their ‘special savings accounts’ do t offer competitive rates. Don’t use them.

reviews.title: Helpful staff
reviews.text: Helpful staff, good range of products, friendly and engaging

reviews.title: The Company failed to provide Me with…
reviews.text: The Company failed to provide Me with any notice or information either by email , post or text  when they were reducing  interest rates and when I made a complaint twice  they ignored Me and said they believed they had done nothing wrong . Terrible service and company

reviews.title: I can’t believe it’s 2024 and there’s…
reviews.text:
I can’t believe it’s 2024 and there’s Company’s like this out there ??

Have they not moved on with times etc etc..

Obviously not.

Been a Nightmare from start to finish,,

Would I recommend them..

NO 100%

reviews.title: Shambles
reviews.text:
Opened an ISA in mid-February. Never received any confirmations or references that the account had been opened. Received an email addressed to another persons name! I had no faith after this so requested the account be closed. And, received no reply to this. 

I then contacted one of the managers (Jon - using an email address he supplies on another website) on 18th February for assistance. He hasn't responded - so don't hold out any hope he'll contact you back if you ever email him!

reviews.title: Not a great experience
reviews.text: Not a great experience.  Took ages for my account to be opened, they didn't send me any account information to pay money into the ISA, when I eventually got some details they didn't work.  Then they started sending me emails addressed to someone else.  I'm glad I wasn't able to transfer any money into this ISA as I am not convinced I would have been able to withdraw it without experience more problems.

reviews.title: I opened an instant access online…
reviews.text: I opened an instant access online savings account, paying 3.69%.  The account was opened within a day & available to use.  This interest rate beat Shawbrook Bank, who currently pay 3.65%.  Small difference, but obviously, the more money you save, the more difference it makes.

reviews.title: Not so good old days...
reviews.text:
Dealing with this company was like going back in time 30 years. The product was a holiday let mortgage in Cornwall an old Mill with 9 acres of fields and a barn. Most lenders stipulate a maximum number of acres if it is a problem for them. Harpenden didn't care about the number of acres they said (well ImpactFS said to my broker and then my broker told me). 
They insist you come through their packager Impact who delayed the process by taking money and not processing the application straight away. Harpenden say they will respond in 5 working days, only to ask more questions. Questions they do not understand the answer to. I said the 9 acres are mostly agricultural land use registered but the property is not agricultural tied, meaning you don't have to be a farm worker to live there. They took the latter to mean the 9 acres was residential and proceeded to waste the next 5 weeks to come back and say they would lend if I split the title deed! Something that currently is taking 8 months with the land registry and is no simple matter. I explained this was not easy task and that they had totally messed me around. They pointed the finger back at me saying they weren't told it was agricultural class land, no apology. 6 weeks wasted. 6 weeks I don't have to waste. 

Do not use this company, they will go into minute detail of your finances, asked about my ISA and Savings accounts, my broker even said my income was more than enough to cover the loan and he couldn't understand it. 
They are an old fashioned lender that is too risk averse and prints off all documents and hands them to an underwriter to review at great length. All for a mortgage less than 70%LTV that is already being let and bringing in a very good revenue.
